name: harness.debug_force_temperature_target_state_audit_mcw
description: Audit one debug weather/temperature primitive end-to-end under the proof-freeze rules: force a distinctive temperature through the debug menu, prove the case-sensitive save/writeback gate, then require same-run saved dimension weather metadata for that temperature. This is harness primitive/process evidence, not product-feature proof.

steps.label: debug_force_temperature_123f
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture is loaded and focused; debug force-temperature primitive starts from the main map screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug force-temperature helper returns to the live map after selecting Force temperature -> Set and submitting 123 Fahrenheit
steps.expected_immediate_state: the live weather manager should hold a forced 123F temperature, but this row is credited only through the later same-run saved dimension weather metadata gate
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing same-run saved dimension temperature metadata after save makes this debug-temperature row non-green
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit the debug force-temperature primitive unless audit_saved_weather_after_debug_force_temperature is green

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_debug_force_temperature_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after forcing temperature and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_debug_force_temperature
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the debug force-temperature save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the debug force-temperature step; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_debug_force_temperature
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.next_step_gate: saved weather metadata may be credited only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_force_temperature_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_force_temperature_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the debug force-temperature save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed debug force-temperature save, proving the following weather audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_weather_after_debug_force_temperature
steps.abort_reason: saved dimension weather metadata did not contain 123F after same-run debug force-temperature save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved dimension weather metadata contains temperature 123F after the debug force-temperature primitive
